---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for RegulaForge
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, discussion
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem or pain point you're experiencing. Ex: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

---

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Include:

- The intended behavior or capability
- How it should work from a user's perspective
- Any success criteria or acceptance criteria

### Example

```text
As a compliance officer, I want to be able to export assessment reports in PDF format
so that I can share them with external auditors without granting them system access.
```

---

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered. Why are they not sufficient?

- **Alternative 1**: [Description and why it doesn't fully solve the problem]
- **Alternative 2**: [Description and why it doesn't fully solve the problem]
- **Workaround**: [Current way you handle this, if any]

---

## Affected Components

Check all that apply:

- [ ] Backend API
- [ ] Frontend UI
- [ ] AI/ML Engine
- [ ] Database / Migrations
- [ ] Infrastructure / Deployment
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests

---

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or screenshots about the feature request here:

- Links to relevant discussions, issues, or external resources
- Screenshots or mockups of the proposed feature
- Integration with existing features or external systems
- Regulatory or compliance requirements this addresses

---

## Impact

| Aspect | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| **Users Affected** | (e.g., compliance officers, system admins, developers) |
| **Priority** | (critical / high / medium / low / nice-to-have) |
| **Effort Estimate** | (small / medium / large / unknown) |
| **Regulatory Relevance** | (e.g., GDPR, SOX, PCI-DSS, HIPAA, Basel III) |
